question: Will the Montgomery Blair Science Bowl team get hoodies for the 2025-26 year?
textDescription:
The club has not received hoodies since 2021-2022. Previous hoodies were "lost in the mail" or were lost due to other reasons. 

This year's captains have told us that we will receive hoodies.

Resolves YES if hoodies are ordered and delivered/confirmed to be on their way by September 1, 2026, and NO if not ordered or lost in the mail.
